reason: Adding supply? to BuildStep and filename to LoadResult changes the TS↔Rust on-disk contract — keep both layers in sync per this guide.
New save_build_order / delete_build_order / open_editor commands must follow the IPC command + error-handling conventions.
The second editor window needs its own capability file with the right window + invoke permissions.
BuildStep/BuildOrder/StoredBuild type changes and validation must follow type-safety rules (no any, narrow unknown).
New <BuildEditor> component and step form must follow component conventions.
useBuildOrders is extended to expose filename mapping + reload-after-save; hook conventions apply.
Editor form state must use immutable updates (new objects, never mutate steps).
Decides placement of lib/supplyTime.ts, lib/buildValidation.ts, components/BuildEditor.
